subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that the gates of attainment unto His presence are flung open wide, the outward key thereof being ink and pen, and the inward key His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که ابواب لقا مفتوحست مفتاحش در ظاهر آمه و خامه و در باطن عنایه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
